## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in Agent Nonsense.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q agent_nonsense`
- [ ] Protocol or preset documentation updated when relevant
- [ ] Sandbox and `SIMULATED:` labeling preserved

## Compatibility

List affected endpoints, server flags, request fields, or desktop clients.
